quotes: Every step counts. Keep moving!
You're stronger than you think.
Consistency is the key to success.
Small wins add up to big results.
Your future self will thank you.
Progress, not perfection.
You've got this! Keep it up!
One day at a time. You're doing great.
Health is wealth. Invest in yourself.
It's not about being the best, it's about being better than yesterday.
Believe in the process. The results will follow.
Every workout is a step closer to your goals.
You are capable of amazing things.
Don't stop now. You're halfway there.
The hardest part is getting started. You already did that!
Keep pushing. Great things await.
Your body can stand almost anything. It's your mind you need to convince.
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
You are doing better than you think.
Keep your eyes on the prize.
